BOOL32 = int32

CreateDXGIFactory2_t = proc (Flags: UINT; riid: ptr DXGuid;
                             ppFactory: ptr pointer): HRESULT {.stdcall.}

  AlphaToCoverageEnable*: BOOL32
  IndependentBlendEnable*: BOOL32
  RenderTarget*: array[8, D3D12_RENDER_TARGET_BLEND_DESC]

  right*, bottom*, back*: UINT

  RasterizerState*: D3D12_RASTERIZER_DESC

  PrimitiveTopologyType*: uint32
  NumRenderTargets*: uint32
  RTVFormats*: array[8, DXGI_FORMAT]

  SampleDesc*: DXGI_SAMPLE_DESC
  NodeMask*: UINT
  CachedPSO*: D3D12_CACHED_PIPELINE_STATE
  Flags*: uint32

  Texture2DArray*: D3D12_TEX2D_ARRAY_SRV
Source   Edit   
D3D12_STATIC_SAMPLER_DESC = object
  Filter*: uint32
  AddressU*: uint32
  AddressV*: uint32
  AddressW*: uint32
  MipLODBias*: FLOAT
  MaxAnisotropy*: uint32
  ComparisonFunc*: uint32
  BorderColor*: uint32
  MinLOD*: FLOAT
  MaxLOD*: FLOAT
  ShaderRegister*: uint32
  RegisterSpace*: uint32
  ShaderVisibility*: uint32
Source   Edit   
D3D12_STREAM_OUTPUT_DESC = object
  pSODeclaration*: pointer
  NumEntries*: UINT
  pBufferStrides*: pointer
  NumStrides*: UINT
  RasterizedStream*: UINT
Source   Edit   
D3D12_SUBRESOURCE_FOOTPRINT = object
  Format*: DXGI_FORMAT
  Width*: UINT
  Height*: UINT
  Depth*: UINT
  RowPitch*: UINT
Source   Edit   
D3D12_TEX2D_ARRAY_SRV = object
  MostDetailedMip*: uint32
  MipLevels*: uint32
  FirstArraySlice*: uint32
  ArraySize*: uint32
  PlaneSlice*: uint32
  ResourceMinLODClamp*: FLOAT
Source   Edit   
D3D12_TEX2D_SRV = object
  MostDetailedMip*: uint32
  MipLevels*: uint32
  PlaneSlice*: uint32
  ResourceMinLODClamp*: FLOAT
Source   Edit   
D3D12_TEXTURE_COPY_LOCATION = object
  pResource*: ID3D12Resource
  typ*: uint32
  data*: D3D12_TEXTURE_COPY_LOCATION_UNION
Source   Edit   
D3D12_TEXTURE_COPY_LOCATION_UNION {.union.} = object
  PlacedFootprint*: D3D12_PLACED_SUBRESOURCE_FOOTPRINT
  SubresourceIndex*: uint32
Source   Edit   
D3D12_VERTEX_BUFFER_VIEW = object
  BufferLocation*: UINT64
  SizeInBytes*: UINT
  StrideInBytes*: UINT
Source   Edit   
D3D12_VIEWPORT = object
  TopLeftX*, TopLeftY*, Width*, Height*, MinDepth*, MaxDepth*: FLOAT
Source   Edit   
D3D_FEATURE_LEVEL = uint32
Source   Edit   
DXGI_FEATURE = uint32
Source   Edit   
DXGI_FORMAT = uint32
Source   Edit   
DXGI_SAMPLE_DESC = object
  Count*: UINT
  Quality*: UINT
Source   Edit   
DXGI_SWAP_CHAIN_DESC1 = object
  Width*, Height*: UINT
  Format*: DXGI_FORMAT
  Stereo*: BOOL32
  SampleDesc*: DXGI_SAMPLE_DESC
  BufferUsage*: UINT
  BufferCount*: UINT
  Scaling*: uint32
  SwapEffect*: uint32
  AlphaMode*: uint32
  Flags*: UINT
Source   Edit   
DXGuid {.pure, packed.} = object
  Data1*: uint32
  Data2*: uint16
  Data3*: uint16
  Data4*: array[8, uint8]
Source   Edit

Consts

D3D12_BLEND_INV_SRC_ALPHA = 6'u32

Source   Edit   
D3D12_BLEND_OP_ADD = 1'u32
Source   Edit   
D3D12_BLEND_SRC_ALPHA = 5'u32
Source   Edit   
D3D12_BLEND_ZERO = 1'u32
Source   Edit   
D3D12_CLEAR_FLAG_DEPTH = 0x00000001'u32

D3D12_COLOR_WRITE_ENABLE_ALL = 0x0000000F'u32
Source   Edit   
D3D12_COMMAND_LIST_TYPE_DIRECT = 0'u32
Source   Edit   
D3D12_COMMAND_QUEUE_FLAG_NONE = 0'u32
Source   Edit   
D3D12_COMMAND_QUEUE_PRIORITY_NORMAL = 0
Source   Edit   
D3D12_COMPARISON_FUNC_ALWAYS = 8'u32
Source   Edit   
D3D12_COMPARISON_FUNC_LESS = 2'u32
Source   Edit   
D3D12_CONSERVATIVE_RASTERIZATION_MODE_OFF = 0'u32
Source   Edit   
D3D12_CULL_MODE_BACK = 3'u32
Source   Edit   
D3D12_CULL_MODE_NONE = 1'u32
Source   Edit   
D3D12_DEFAULT_SAMPLE_MASK = 0xFFFFFFFF'u32
Source   Edit   
D3D12_DEFAULT_SHADER_4_COMPONENT_MAPPING = 0x00001688'u32
Source   Edit   
D3D12_DEPTH_WRITE_MASK_ALL = 1'u32
Source   Edit   
D3D12_DESCRIPTOR_HEAP_FLAG_NONE = 0'u32
Source   Edit   
D3D12_DESCRIPTOR_HEAP_FLAG_SHADER_VISIBLE = 0x00000001'u32

D3D12_DESCRIPTOR_HEAP_TYPE_CBV_SRV_UAV = 0'u32
Source   Edit   
D3D12_DESCRIPTOR_HEAP_TYPE_DSV = 3'u32

Source   Edit

Source   Edit   
D3D12_DESCRIPTOR_RANGE_TYPE_SRV = 0'u32
Source   Edit   
D3D12_FENCE_FLAG_NONE = 0'u32
Source   Edit   
D3D12_FILL_MODE_SOLID = 3'u32
Source   Edit   
D3D12_FILTER_ANISOTROPIC = 0x00000055'u32
Source   Edit   
D3D12_FILTER_MIN_MAG_MIP_LINEAR = 0x00000015'u32
Source   Edit   
D3D12_HEAP_FLAG_NONE = 0'u32
Source   Edit   
D3D12_HEAP_TYPE_DEFAULT = 1'u32
Source   Edit   
D3D12_HEAP_TYPE_UPLOAD = 2'u32
Source   Edit   
D3D12_INPUT_CLASSIFICATION_PER_VERTEX_DATA = 0'u32
Source   Edit   
D3D12_PRIMITIVE_TOPOLOGY_TYPE_TRIANGLE = 3'u32
Source   Edit   
D3D12_RESOURCE_BARRIER_ALL_SUBRESOURCES = 0xFFFFFFFF'u32
Source   Edit   
D3D12_RESOURCE_BARRIER_FLAG_NONE = 0'u32
Source   Edit   
D3D12_RESOURCE_BARRIER_TYPE_TRANSITION = 0'u32
Source   Edit   
D3D12_RESOURCE_DIMENSION_BUFFER = 1'u32
Source   Edit   
D3D12_RESOURCE_DIMENSION_TEXTURE2D = 3'u32
Source   Edit   
D3D12_RESOURCE_FLAG_ALLOW_DEPTH_STENCIL = 0x00000002'u32
Source   Edit   
D3D12_RESOURCE_FLAG_ALLOW_RENDER_TARGET = 0x00000001'u32
Source   Edit   
D3D12_RESOURCE_FLAG_NONE = 0'u32
Source   Edit   
D3D12_RESOURCE_STATE_COPY_DEST = 0x00000400'u32
Source   Edit   
D3D12_RESOURCE_STATE_DEPTH_WRITE = 0x00000010'u32
Source   Edit   
D3D12_RESOURCE_STATE_GENERIC_READ = 2755'u32
Source   Edit

Source   Edit   
D3D12_RESOURCE_STATE_PRESENT = 0'u32
Source   Edit   
D3D12_RESOURCE_STATE_RENDER_TARGET = 0x00000004'u32
Source   Edit

Source   Edit   
D3D12_RESOURCE_STATE_RESOLVE_SOURCE = 0x00002000'u32
Source   Edit   
D3D12_RESOURCE_STATE_VERTEX_AND_CONSTANT_BUFFER = 0x00000001'u32
Source   Edit   
D3D12_ROOT_PARAMETER_TYPE_32BIT_CONSTANTS = 1'u32
Source   Edit   
D3D12_ROOT_PARAMETER_TYPE_CBV = 2'u32

Source   Edit   
D3D12_ROOT_PARAMETER_TYPE_SRV = 3'u32
Source   Edit

Source   Edit

Source   Edit   
D3D12_SHADER_VISIBILITY_ALL = 0'u32
Source   Edit   
D3D12_SHADER_VISIBILITY_PIXEL = 5'u32
Source   Edit   
D3D12_SRV_DIMENSION_TEXTURE2D = 4'u32
Source   Edit   
D3D12_STATIC_BORDER_COLOR_OPAQUE_BLACK = 1'u32
Source   Edit   
D3D12_STATIC_BORDER_COLOR_OPAQUE_WHITE = 2'u32
Source   Edit   
D3D12_STATIC_BORDER_COLOR_TRANSPARENT_BLACK = 0'u32
Source   Edit   
D3D12_STENCIL_OP_KEEP = 1'u32
Source   Edit   
D3D12_TEXTURE_ADDRESS_MODE_CLAMP = 3'u32
Source   Edit   
D3D12_TEXTURE_ADDRESS_MODE_WRAP = 1'u32
Source   Edit   
D3D12_TEXTURE_COPY_TYPE_PLACED_FOOTPRINT = 1'u32
Source   Edit

Source   Edit   
D3D12_TEXTURE_LAYOUT_UNKNOWN = 0'u32
Source   Edit   
D3D_FEATURE_LEVEL_11_0 = 0x0000B000'u32
Source   Edit

DXGI_ALPHA_MODE_UNSPECIFIED = 0'u32
Source   Edit   
DXGI_FEATURE_PRESENT_ALLOW_TEARING = 0'u32
Source   Edit   
DXGI_FORMAT_D32_FLOAT = 40'u32
Source   Edit

Source   Edit

Source   Edit   
DXGI_FORMAT_UNKNOWN = 0'u32

DXGI_MWA_NO_ALT_ENTER = 0x00000002'u32
Source   Edit   
DXGI_PRESENT_ALLOW_TEARING = 0x00000200'u32
Source   Edit   
DXGI_SCALING_STRETCH = 0'u32
Source   Edit   
DXGI_SWAP_CHAIN_FLAG_ALLOW_TEARING = 0x00000800'u32
Source   Edit   
DXGI_SWAP_EFFECT_FLIP_DISCARD = 4'u32
Source   Edit   
DXGI_USAGE_RENDER_TARGET_OUTPUT = 0x00000020'u32
Source   Edit   
FRAME_COUNT = 2
Source   Edit   
S_OK = 0
Source   Edit   
WAIT_INFINITE = -1'i32
Source   Edit  

Procs

proc checkFeatureSupport(factory: IDXGIFactory5; feature: DXGI_FEATURE;
                         supportData: pointer; supportDataSize: UINT) {.
    ...raises: [Exception], tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Queries feature support from the DXGI factory. Source   Edit   
proc clearDepthStencilView(self: ID3D12GraphicsCommandList;
                           handle: D3D12_CPU_DESCRIPTOR_HANDLE; flags: uint32;
                           depth: FLOAT; stencil: uint8; rectCount: UINT;
                           rects: pointer) {....raises: [Exception],
    tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Source   Edit   
proc clearRenderTargetView(self: ID3D12GraphicsCommandList;
                           handle: D3D12_CPU_DESCRIPTOR_HANDLE;
                           color: ptr FLOAT; rectCount: UINT; rects: pointer) {.
    ...raises: [Exception], tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Source   Edit   
proc close(self: ID3D12GraphicsCommandList) {....raises: [Exception],
    tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Closes the command list for submission. Source   Edit   
proc compileShader(source: string; entryPoint: string; target: string;
                   flags: uint32 = 0): ID3DBlob {....raises: [Exception],
    tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Compiles HLSL source into a shader blob. Source   Edit

                      dstOffset: UINT64; src: ID3D12Resource; srcOffset: UINT64;
                      numBytes: UINT64) {....raises: [Exception],
    tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}

Creates a command allocator. Source   Edit

    ...raises: [Exception], tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}

    tags: [], forbids: [].}

    ...raises: [Exception], tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
